name: @jaames/iro

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a wheel- or box-style expressive color picker with an alpha slider, hex/rgb/hsv formats, and multiple color selection instead of a bare <input type=color>, such as for theme customization, drawing tools, or design controls. For a full row of parameter controls, use leva or tweakpane from the catalog; for one native color swatch, do not add it.
en.why_valuable: An HSV color wheel or gradient box requires real color-space math, canvas/conic rendering, synchronized sliders, and format conversion. AI-written versions usually stop at a broken hue strip rather than a true color wheel.

data_in.note: These are native iro options. The default export is the iro namespace, so construct with new iro.ColorPicker(el, options). The event outlet is picker.on('color:change', cb), and the color object exposes hexString/rgb/hsv/rgba.

schema.color?: string -- initial color in any CSS, hex, rgb, or hsv format; defaults to '#fff'
schema.width?: number -- overall control width (wheel diameter); defaults to 300
schema.colors?: string[] -- initial set for multi-color selection; defaults to one color
schema.transparency?: boolean -- whether to include the alpha channel/slider; defaults to false

spec.note: iro renders from the width option (wheel height is approximately width), and content determines total height. :host{display:block;width:100%} grows with it; do not use vh or percentage heights.

when_to_use: 需要 wheel/box 型表达式颜色选择器(带 alpha 滑块、hex/rgb/hsv 多格式、多色选择)而非裸 <input type=color> 时用它——主题定制、绘图工具、设计控件。要一整排参数面板用目录里的 leva/tweakpane;只要一个原生色块就别上。
why_valuable: HSV 色轮/渐变方块要真实色彩空间数学 + canvas/conic 渲染 + 多滑块联动 + 格式互转;AI 从零写通常只能凑出坏掉的 hue 长条,做不出真正的轮盘。

data_in.note: iro 原生 options;默认导出是 iro 命名空间,构造走 new iro.ColorPicker(el, options)。事件出口 picker.on('color:change', cb),color 对象带 hexString/rgb/hsv/rgba。

schema.color?: string —— 初始颜色(任意 CSS 格式/hex/rgb/hsv),默认 '#fff'
schema.width?: number —— 控件总宽度(轮盘直径),默认 300
schema.colors?: string[] —— 多色选择的初始色组,默认单色
schema.transparency?: boolean —— 是否含 alpha 通道/滑块,默认 false

spec.note: iro 按 width 选项自渲染(轮盘高≈width),高度由内容撑开;:host{display:block;width:100%} 撑高,禁 vh/百分比高。

uplink: color:change 回调携带当前 color(hexString/rgba/hsv);若需外传选中色,由消费 AI 直接接 picker.on() 原生回调并按载体处理,本条不预设事件契约。

carriers.widget: supported:SVG 控件 + 事件回调落 shadow,iro 零全局样式注入,天然 shadow-safe
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN,纯 SVG DOM,无 worker/wasm/uplink 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: +esm default export 为 iro 命名空间(grep: 'ft as default');API iro.ColorPicker(parent: string|HTMLElement, props) 见 dist/ColorPicker.d.ts,README 实例 `new iro.ColorPicker('#picker', {width:320, color:'#f00'})`。选项 width/color/colors/layoutDirection/padding/margin/borderWidth/borderColor/handleRadius/sliderSize/wheelLightness/wheelAngle/boxHeight/transparency 均真实(README availableOptions + iro-core IroColorPickerOptions)。零全局足迹:+esm grep document.head=0、document.body=0——iro 把 SVG 渲染进传入的 parent 元素并内联样式(无外部 CSS、无 stylesheet 注入)。事件 picker.on('color:change', cb),color.hexString/.rgba/.hsv 见 ColorPicker.d.ts 的 on/off 方法。完全容器内 → shadow 安全。
